org.apache.flink.api.common.state.v2.ListStateDescriptor<>(\n                                \"window-contents\",\n                                STRING_INT_TUPLE.createSerializer(new SerializerConfigImpl()));\n\n        WindowOperatorFactory<\n                        String,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        Iterable<Tuple2<String, Integer>>,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        TimeWindow>\n                operator =\n                        new WindowOperatorFactory<>(\n                                TumblingEventTimeWindows.of(Duration.ofSeconds(windowSize)),\n                                new TimeWindow.Serializer(),\n                                new TupleKeySelector(),\n                                BasicTypeInfo.STRING_TYPE_INFO.createSerializer(\n                                        new SerializerConfigImpl()),\n                                windowStateDesc,\n                                new InternalIterableWindowFunction<>(new EmptyReturnFunction()),\n                                new FireEverytimeOnElementAndEventTimeTrigger(),\n                                lateness,\n                                null /* late data output tag */);\n\n        WindowOperatorBuilder<Tuple2<String, Integer>, String, TimeWindow> builder =\n                new WindowOperatorBuilder<>(\n                        TumblingEventTimeWindows.of(Duration.ofSeconds(windowSize)),\n                        new FireEverytimeOnElementAndEventTimeTrigger(),\n                        new ExecutionConfig(),\n                        STRING_INT_TUPLE,\n                        new TupleKeySelector(),\n                        TypeInformation.of(String.class));\n        builder.allowedLateness(Duration.ofMillis(lateness));\n\n        OneInputStreamOperatorTestHarness<Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple2<String, Integer>>\n                testHarness =\n                        enableAsyncState\n                                ? createAsyncTestHarness(\n                                        builder.asyncApply(new EmptyReturnFunction()))\n                                : createTestHarness(operator);\n\n        testHarness.open();\n\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> expected = new ConcurrentLinkedQueue<>();\n        // normal element\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"test_key\", 1), 1000));\n        if (enableAsyncState) {\n            assertThat(\n                            ((AsyncWindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .getProcessContext()\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDescV2)\n                                    .get()\n                                    .toString())\n                    .isEqualTo(\"[(test_key,1)]\");\n        } else {\n            assertThat(\n                            ((WindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .processContext\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDesc)\n                                    .get()\n                                    .toString())\n                    .isEqualTo(\"[(test_key,1)]\");\n        }\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(1599));\n        if (enableAsyncState) {\n            assertThat(\n                            ((AsyncWindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .getProcessContext()\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDescV2)\n                                    .get()\n                                    .toString())\n                    .isEqualTo(\"[(test_key,1)]\");\n        } else {\n            assertThat(\n                            ((WindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .processContext\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDesc)\n                                    .get()\n                                    .toString())\n                    .isEqualTo(\"[(test_key,1)]\");\n        }\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(1699));\n        if (enableAsyncState) {\n            assertThat(\n                            ((AsyncWindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .getProcessContext()\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDescV2)\n                                    .get()\n                                    .toString())\n                    .isEqualTo(\"[(test_key,1)]\");\n          .isEqualTo(\"[(test_key,1)]\");\n        }\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(1799));\n        if (enableAsyncState) {\n            assertThat(\n                            ((AsyncWindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .getProcessContext()\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDescV2)\n                                    .get()\n                                    .toString())\n                    .isEqualTo(\"[(test_key,1)]\");\n        } else {\n            assertThat(\n                            ((WindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .processContext\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDesc)\n                                    .get()\n                                    .toString())\n                    .isEqualTo(\"[(test_key,1)]\");\n        }\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(1999));\n        if (enableAsyncState) {\n            assertThat(\n                            ((AsyncWindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .getProcessContext()\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDescV2)\n                                    .get()\n                                    .toString())\n                    .isEqualTo(\"[(test_key,1)]\");\n        } else {\n            assertThat(\n                            ((WindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .processContext\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDesc)\n                                    .get()\n                                    .toString())\n                    .isEqualTo(\"[(test_key,1)]\");\n        }\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(2000));\n        if (enableAsyncState) {\n            // Be empty => list.get() is null\n            assertThat(\n                            ((AsyncWindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .getProcessContext()\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDescV2)\n                                    .get())\n                    .isNull();\n        } else {\n            assertThat(\n                            ((WindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .processContext\n .isEqualTo(\"[]\");\n        }\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(5000));\n        if (enableAsyncState) {\n            assertThat(\n                            ((AsyncWindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .getProcessContext()\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDescV2)\n                                    .get())\n                    .isNull();\n        } else {\n            assertThat(\n                            ((WindowOperator<?, ?, ?, ?, ?>) testHarness.getOperator())\n                                    .processContext\n                                    .windowState()\n                                    .getListState(windowStateDesc)\n                                    .get()\n                                    .toString())\n                    .isEqualTo(\"[]\");\n        }\n\n        expected.add(new Watermark(1599));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(1699));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(1799));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(1999)); // here it fires and purges\n        expected.add(new Watermark(2000)); // here is the cleanup timer\n        expected.add(new Watermark(5000));\n\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\",\n                expected,\n                testHarness.getOutput(),\n                new Tuple2ResultSortComparator());\n        testHarness.close();\n    }\n\n    // ------------------------------------------------------------------------\n    //  UDFs\n    // ------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    private static class PassThroughFunction\n            implements WindowFunction<\n                    Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple2<String, Integer>, String, TimeWindow> {\n        private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n        @Override\n        public void apply(\n                String k,\n                TimeWindow window,\n                Iterable<Tuple2<String, Integer>> input,\n                Collector<Tuple2<String, Integer>> out)\n                throws Exception {\n            for (Tuple2<String, Integer> in : input) {\n                out.collect(in);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    private static class EmptyReturnFunction\n            implements WindowFunction<\n                    Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple2<String, Integer>, String, TimeWindow> {\n        private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n        @Override\n        public void apply(\n                String k,\n                TimeWindow window,\n                Iterable<Tuple2<String, Integer>> input,\n                Collector<Tuple2<String, Integer>> out)\n                throws Exception {}\n    }\n\n    private static class SumReducer implements ReduceFunction<Tuple2<String, Integer>> {\n        private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n        @Override\n        public Tuple2<String, Integer> reduce(\n                Tuple2<String, Integer> value1, Tuple2<String, Integer> value2) throws Exception {\n            return new Tuple2<>(value2.f0, value1.f1 + value2.f1);\n        }\n    }\n\n    private static class RichSumReducer<W extends Window>\n            extends RichWindowFunction<\n                    Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple2<String, Integer>, String, W> {\n        private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n        private boolean openCalled = false;\n\n        @Override\n        public void open(OpenContext openContext) throws Exception {\n            super.open(openContext);\n            openCalled = true;\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public void close() throws Exception {\n            super.close();\n            closeCalled.incrementAndGet();\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public void apply(\n                String key,\n                W window,\n                Iterable<Tuple2<String, Integer>> input,\n                Collector<Tuple2<String, Integer>> out)\n                throws Exception {\n\n            assertThat(openCalled).as(\"Open was not called\").isTrue();\n\n            int sum = 0;\n\n            for (Tuple2<String, Integer> t : input) {\n                sum += t.f1;\n            }\n            out.collect(new Tuple2<>(key, sum));\n        }\n    }\n\n    @SuppressWarnings(\"unchecked\")\n    private static class Tuple2ResultSortComparator implements Comparator<Object>, Serializable {\n        @Override\n        public int compare(Object o1, Object o2) {\n            if (o1 instanceof Watermark || o2 instanceof Watermark) {\n                return 0;\n            } else {\n                StreamRecord<Tuple2<String, Integer>> sr0 =\n                        (StreamRecord<Tuple2<String, Integer>>) o1;\n                StreamRecord<Tuple2<String, Integer>> sr1 =\n                        (StreamRecord<Tuple2<String, Integer>>) o2;\n                if (sr0.getTimestamp() != sr1.getTimestamp()) {\n                    return (int) (sr0.getTimestamp() - sr1.getTimestamp());\n                }\n                int comparison = sr0.getValue().f0.compareTo(sr1.getValue().f0);\n                if (comparison != 0) {\n                    return comparison;\n                } else {\n                    return sr0.getValue().f1 - sr1.getValue().f1;\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    @SuppressWarnings(\"unchecked\")\n    private static class Tuple3ResultSortComparator implements Comparator<Object>, Serializable {\n        @Override\n        public int compare(Object o1, Object o2) {\n            if (o1 instanceof Watermark || o2 instanceof Watermark) {\n                return 0;\n            } else {\n                StreamRecord<Tuple3<String, Long, Long>> sr0 =\n                        (StreamRecord<Tuple3<String, Long, Long>>) o1;\n                StreamRecord<Tuple3<String, Long, Long>> sr1 =\n                        (StreamRecord<Tuple3<String, Long, Long>>) o2;\n                if (sr0.getTimestamp() != sr1.getTimestamp()) {\n                    return (int) (sr0.getTimestamp() - sr1.getTimestamp());\n                }\n                int comparison = sr0.getValue().f0.compareTo(sr1.getValue().f0);\n                if (comparison != 0) {\n                    return comparison;\n                } else {\n                    comparison = (int) (sr0.getValue().f1 - sr1.getValue().f1);\n                    if (comparison != 0) {\n                        return comparison;\n                    }\n                    return (int) (sr0.getValue().f2 - sr1.getValue().f2);\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    private static class TupleKeySelector implements KeySelector<Tuple2<String, Integer>, String> {\n        private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n        @Override\n        public String getKey(Tuple2<String, Integer> value) throws Exception {\n            return value.f0;\n        }\n    }\n\n    private static class SessionWindowFunction\n            implements WindowFunction<\n                    Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple3<String, Long, Long>, String, TimeWindow> {\n        private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n        @Override\n        public void apply(\n                String key,\n                TimeWindow window,\n                Iterable<Tuple2<String, Integer>> values,\n                Collector<Tuple3<String, Long, Long>> out)\n                throws Exception {\n            int sum = 0;\n            for (Tuple2<String, Integer> i : values) {\n                sum += i.f1;\n            }\n            String resultString = key + \"-\" + sum;\n            out.collect(new Tuple3<>(resultString, window.getStart(), window.getEnd()));\n        }\n    }\n\n    private static class ReducedSessionWindowFunction\n            implements WindowFunction<\n                    Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple3<String, Long, Long>, String, TimeWindow> {\n        private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n        @Override\n        public void apply(\n                String key,\n                TimeWindow window,\n                Iterable<Tuple2<String, Integer>> values,\n                Collector<Tuple3<String, Long, Long>> out)\n                throws Exception {\n            for (Tuple2<String, Integer> val : values) {\n                out.collect(new Tuple3<>(key + \"-\" + val.f1, window.getStart(), window.getEnd()));\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    private static class SessionProcessWindowFunction\n            extends ProcessWindowFunction<\n                    Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple3<String, Long, Long>, String, TimeWindow> {\n        private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n        @Override\n        public void process(\n                String key,\n                Context context,\n                Iterable<Tuple2<String, Integer>> values,\n                Collector<Tuple3<String, Long, Long>> out)\n                throws Exception {\n            int sum = 0;\n            for (Tuple2<String, Integer> i : values) {\n                sum += i.f1;\n            }\n            String resultString = key + \"-\" + sum;\n            TimeWindow window = context.window();\n            out.collect(new Tuple3<>(resultString, window.getStart(), window.getEnd()));\n        }\n    }\n\n    private static class ReducedProcessSessionWindowFunction\n            extends ProcessWindowFunction<\n                    Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple3<String, Long, Long>, String, TimeWindow> {\n        private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n        @Override\n        public void process(\n                String key,\n                Context context,\n                Iterable<Tuple2<String, Integer>> values,\n                Collector<Tuple3<String, Long, Long>> out)\n                throws Exception {\n            TimeWindow window = context.window();\n            for (Tuple2<String, Integer> val : values) {\n                out.collect(new Tuple3<>(key + \"-\" + val.f1, window.getStart(), window.getEnd()));\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    private static class PointSessionWindows extends EventTimeSessionWindows {\n        private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n        private PointSessionWindows(long sessionTimeout) {\n            super(sessionTimeout);\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        @SuppressWarnings(\"unchecked\")\n        public Collection<TimeWindow> assignWindows(\n                Object element, long timestamp, WindowAssignerContext ctx) {\n            if (element instanceof Tuple2) {\n                Tuple2<String, Integer> t2 = (Tuple2<String, Integer>) element;\n                if (t2.f1 == 33) {\n                    return Collections.singletonList(new TimeWindow(timestamp, timestamp));\n                }\n            }\n            return Collections.singletonList(new TimeWindow(timestamp, timestamp + sessionTimeout));\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * A trigger that fires at the end of the window but does not purge the state of the fired\n     * window. This is to test the state garbage collection mechanism.\n     */\n    private static class EventTimeTriggerAccumGC extends Trigger<Object, TimeWindow> {\n        private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n        private long cleanupTime;\n\n        public EventTimeTriggerAccumGC(long cleanupTime) {\n            this.cleanupTime = cleanupTime;\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public TriggerResult onElement(\n                Object element, long timestamp, TimeWindow window, TriggerContext ctx)\n                throws Exception {\n            if (window.maxTimestamp() <= ctx.getCurrentWatermark()) {\n                // if the watermark is already past the window fire immediately\n                return TriggerResult.FIRE;\n            } else {\n                ctx.registerEventTimeTimer(window.maxTimestamp());\n                return TriggerResult.CONTINUE;\n            }\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public TriggerResult onEventTime(long time, TimeWindow window, TriggerContext ctx) {\n            return time == window.maxTimestamp() || time == window.maxTimestamp() + cleanupTime\n                    ? TriggerResult.FIRE_AND_PURGE\n                    : TriggerResult.CONTINUE;\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public TriggerResult onProcessingTime(long time, TimeWindow window, TriggerContext ctx)\n                throws Exception {\n            return TriggerResult.CONTINUE;\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public void clear(TimeWindow window, TriggerContext ctx) throws Exception {\n            ctx.deleteEventTimeTimer(window.maxTimestamp());\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public boolean canMerge() {\n            return true;\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public void onMerge(TimeWindow window, OnMergeContext ctx) {\n            ctx.registerEventTimeTimer(window.maxTimestamp());\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public String toString() {\n            return \"EventTimeTrigger()\";\n        }\n    }\n\n    private static class FireEverytimeOnElementAndEventTimeTrigger\n            extends Trigger<Tuple2<String, Integer>, TimeWindow> {\n        @Override\n        public TriggerResult onElement(\n                Tuple2<String, Integer> element,\n                long timestamp,\n                TimeWindow window,\n                TriggerContext ctx)\n                throws Exception {\n            return TriggerResult.FIRE;\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public TriggerResult onProcessingTime(long time, TimeWindow window, TriggerContext ctx)\n                throws Exception {\n            return TriggerResult.FIRE;\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public TriggerResult onEventTime(long time, TimeWindow window, TriggerContext ctx)\n                throws Exception {\n            return TriggerResult.FIRE;\n        }\n\n        @Override\n        public void clear(TimeWindow window, TriggerContext ctx) throws Exception {}\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void testSideOutputDueToLatenessWithMergingSessionWindows() throws Exception {\n        // Test for bug: late element that could extend a session window should be side-output\n        // even if the extended window hasn't been cleaned up yet.\n        // This tests the scenario where:\n        // 1. A session window exists [1000, 4000)\n        // 2. Watermark advances to 3500\n        // 3. A late element at 2000 arrives (late because 2000 + 0 <= 3500)\n        // 4. This element could extend the window to [1000, 5000)\n        // 5. The bug is that the element gets processed (not side-output) because\n        //    the extended window is not yet late (5000 + 0 > 3500)\n\n        final int gapSize = 3;\n        final long lateness = 0;\n\n        ReducingStateDescriptor<Tuple2<String, Integer>> stateDesc =\n                new ReducingStateDescriptor<>(\n                        \"window-contents\",\n                        new SumReducer(),\n                        STRING_INT_TUPLE.createSerializer(new SerializerConfigImpl()));\n\n        WindowOperatorFactory<\n                        String,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        Tuple2<String, Integer>,\n                        Tuple3<String, Long, Long>,\n                        TimeWindow>\n                operator =\n                        new WindowOperatorFactory<>(\n                                EventTimeSessionWindows.withGap(Duration.ofSeconds(gapSize)),\n                                new TimeWindow.Serializer(),\n                                new TupleKeySelector(),\n                                BasicTypeInfo.STRING_TYPE_INFO.createSerializer(\n                                        new SerializerConfigImpl()),\n                                stateDesc,\n                                new InternalSingleValueWindowFunction<>(\n                                        new ReducedSessionWindowFunction()),\n                                EventTimeTrigger.create(),\n                                lateness,\n                                lateOutputTag);\n\n        OneInputStreamOperatorTestHarness<Tuple2<String, Integer>, Tuple3<String, Long, Long>>\n                testHarness = createTestHarness(operator);\n\n        testHarness.open();\n\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> expected = new ConcurrentLinkedQueue<>();\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> sideExpected = new ConcurrentLinkedQueue<>();\n\n        // Create a session window with element at 1000\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 1), 1000));\n        // Create another element to extend the window to [1000, 4000)\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 1), 1500));\n\n        // Process watermark to 3500\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(3500));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(3500));\n\n        // Now send a late element at timestamp 2000\n        // This is late because: 2000 + 0 <= 3500\n        // But it could extend the existing window [1000, 4000) to [1000, 5000)\n        // The bug: this element should be side-output, but it might be processed\n        // instead because the extended window [1000, 5000) is not late (5000 > 3500)\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 1), 2000));\n\n        // Process watermark to 5001 to trigger window emission\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(5001));\n\n        // Expected: the late element should be in side output, not in main output\n        sideExpected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 1), 2000));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(5001));\n\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> actual = testHarness.getOutput();\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<StreamRecord<Tuple2<String, Integer>>> sideActual =\n                testHarness.getSideOutput(lateOutputTag);\n\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\", expected, actual, new Tuple2ResultSortComparator());\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"SideOutput was not correct.\",\n                sideExpected,\n                (Iterable) sideActual,\n                new Tuple2ResultSortComparator());\n\n        testHarness.close();\n    }\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,

        "+        // Create another element to extend the window to [1000, 4500)",
        "         testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 1), 1500));",

        " ",
        "         // Now send a late element at timestamp 2000",
        "         // This is late because: 2000 + 0 <= 3500",
        "-        // But it could extend the existing window [1000, 4000) to [1000, 5000)",
        "-        // The bug: this element should be side-output, but it might be processed",
        "-        // instead because the extended window [1000, 5000) is not late (5000 > 3500)",
        "+        // The window [1000, 4500) is NOT yet late (4500 + 0 > 3500)",
        "+        // Without the fix, this late element would be merged into [1000, 4500)",
        "+        // making the result [1000, 5000) with sum=3",
        "+        // With the fix, the element should go to side output and not be processed",
        "         testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 1), 2000));",
        " ",
        "         // Process watermark to 5001 to trigger window emission",
        "         testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(5001));",
        " ",
        "-        // Expected: the late element should be in side output, not in main output",
        "+        // Expected: the window fires with sum=2 (only the two early elements)",
        "+        // The late element should be in side output",
        "+        expected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple3<>(\"key1-2\", 1000L, 4500L), 4499));",
        "         sideExpected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key1\", 1), 2000));",
        "         expected.add(new Watermark(5001));",

If we don't merge then\n                    // actualWindow == window\n                    W actualWindow =\n                            mergingWindows.addWindow(\n                                    window,\n                                    new MergingWindowSet.MergeFunction<W>() {\n                                        @Override",

Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/flink/flink-streaming-java/src/test/java/org/apache/flink/streaming/runtime/operators/windowing/WindowOperatorTest.java",
  "limit": 30,
  "offset": 2637
}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 11600));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(14600));\n\n        expected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple3<>(\"key2-1\", 11600L, 14600L), 14599));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(14600));\n\n        // this is sideoutput as late, reuse last timestamp\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 10000));\n        sideExpected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 10000));\n\n        testHarness.processElement(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple2<>(\"key2\", 1), 14500));\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(20000));\n\n        expected.add(new StreamRecord<>(new Tuple3<>(\"key2-1\", 14500L, 17500L), 17499));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(20000));\n\n        testHarness.processWatermark(new Watermark(100000));\n        expected.add(new Watermark(100000));\n\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<Object> actual = testHarness.getOutput();\n        ConcurrentLinkedQueue<StreamRecord<Tuple2<String, Integer>>> sideActual =\n                testHarness.getSideOutput(lateOutputTag);\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"Output was not correct.\", expected, actual, new Tuple2ResultSortComparator());\n        TestHarnessUtil.assertOutputEqualsSorted(\n                \"SideOutput was not correct.\",\n                sideExpected,\n                (Iterable) sideActual,\n                new Tuple2ResultSortComparator());\n        testHarness.close();",
    "filePath": "/workspace/flink/flink-streaming-java/src/test/java/org/apache/flink/streaming/runtime/operators/windowing/WindowOperatorTest.java",
    "numLines": 30,
    "startLine": 2637,
    "totalLines": 4065
  },
  "type": "text"
}

Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/flink/flink-runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/flink/streaming/runtime/operators/windowing/WindowOperator.java",
  "new_string": "        if (windowAssigner instanceof MergingWindowAssigner) {\n            MergingWindowSet<W> mergingWindows = getMergingWindowSet();\n\n            // For merging windows, check if the element is late before processing.\n            // Late elements should not be merged into any window, even if the resulting\n            // window would not be late yet.\n            boolean elementIsLate = isElementLate(element);\n\n            if (!elementIsLate) {\n                for (W window : elementWindows) {\n\n                    // adding the new window might result in a merge, in that case the actualWindow\n                    // is the merged window and we work with that. If we don't merge then\n                    // actualWindow == window\n                    W actualWindow =\n                            mergingWindows.addWindow(\n                                    window,\n                                    new MergingWindowSet.MergeFunction<W>() {\n                                        @Override\n                                        public void merge(\n                                                W mergeResult,\n                                                Collection<W> mergedWindows,\n                                                W stateWindowResult,\n                                                Collection<W> mergedStateWindows)\n                                                throws Exception {\n\n                                            if ((windowAssigner.isEventTime()\n                                                    && mergeResult.maxTimestamp() + allowedLateness\n                                                            <= internalTimerService\n                                                                    .currentWatermark())) {\n                                                throw new UnsupportedOperationException(\n                                                        \"The end timestamp of an \"\n                                                                + \"event-time window cannot become earlier than the current watermark \"\n                                                                + \"by merging. Current watermark: \"\n                                                                + internalTimerService\n                                                                        .currentWatermark()\n                                                                + \" window: \"\n                                                                + mergeResult);\n                                            } else if (!windowAssigner.isEventTime()) {\n                                                long currentProcessingTime =\n                                                        internalTimerService.currentProcessingTime();\n                                                if (mergeResult.maxTimestamp()\n                                                        <= currentProcessingTime) {\n                                                    throw new UnsupportedOperationException(\n                                                            \"The end timestamp of a \"\n                                                                    + \"processing-time window cannot become earlier than the current processing time \"\n                                                                    + \"by merging. Current processing time: \"\n                                                                    + currentProcessingTime\n                                                                    + \" window: \"\n                                                                    + mergeResult);\n                                                }\n                                            }\n\n                                            triggerContext.key = key;\n                                            triggerContext.window = mergeResult;\n\n                                            triggerContext.onMerge(mergedWindows);\n\n                                            for (W m : mergedWindows) {\n                                                triggerContext.window = m;\n                                                triggerContext.clear();\n                                                deleteCleanupTimer(m);\n                                            }\n\n                                            // merge the merged state windows into the newly resulting\n                                            // state window\n                                            windowMergingState.mergeNamespaces(\n                                                    stateWindowResult, mergedStateWindows);\n                                        }\n                                    });\n\n                    // drop if the window is already late\n                    if (isWindowLate(actualWindow)) {\n                        mergingWindows.retireWindow(actualWindow);\n                        continue;\n                    }\n                    isSkippedElement = false;\n\n                    W stateWindow = mergingWindows.getStateWindow(actualWindow);\n                    if (stateWindow == null) {\n                        throw new IllegalStateException(\n                                \"Window \" + window + \" is not in in-flight window set.\");\n                    }\n\n                    windowState.setCurrentNamespace(stateWindow);\n                    windowState.add(element.getValue());\n\n                    triggerContext.key = key;\n                    triggerContext.window = actualWindow;\n\n                    TriggerResult triggerResult = triggerContext.onElement(element);\n\n                    if (triggerResult.isFire()) {\n                        ACC contents = windowState.get();\n                        if (contents != null) {\n                            emitWindowContents(actualWindow, contents);\n                        }\n                    }\n\n                    if (triggerResult.isPurge()) {\n                        windowState.clear();\n                    }\n                    registerCleanupTimer(actualWindow);\n                }\n            }\n\n            // need to make sure to update the merging state in state\n            mergingWindows.persist();",
  "old_string": "        if (windowAssigner instanceof MergingWindowAssigner) {\n            MergingWindowSet<W> mergingWindows = getMergingWindowSet();\n\n            // Check if the element itself is late before processing it for windows.\n            // For merging windows, a late element should not be merged into any window,\n            // even if the resulting window would not be late yet.\n            if (isElementLate(element)) {\n                // Mark element as skipped so it will be emitted to side output below\n                isSkippedElement = true;\n            } else {\n                for (W window : elementWindows) {\n\n                    // adding the new window might result in a merge, in that case the actualWindow\n                    // is the merged window and we work with that. If we don't merge then\n                    // actualWindow == window\n                    W actualWindow =\n                            mergingWindows.addWindow(\n                                    window,\n                                    new MergingWindowSet.MergeFunction<W>() {\n                                        @Override\n                                        public void merge(\n                                                W mergeResult,\n                                                Collection<W> mergedWindows,\n                                                W stateWindowResult,\n                                                Collection<W> mergedStateWindows)\n                                                throws Exception {\n\n                                            if ((windowAssigner.isEventTime()\n                                                    && mergeResult.maxTimestamp() + allowedLateness\n                                                            <= internalTimerService\n                                                                    .currentWatermark())) {\n                                                throw new UnsupportedOperationException(\n                                                        \"The end timestamp of an \"\n                                                                + \"event-time window cannot become earlier than the current watermark \"\n                                                                + \"by merging. Current watermark: \"\n                                                                + internalTimerService\n                                                                        .currentWatermark()\n                                                                + \" window: \"\n                                                                + mergeResult);\n                                            } else if (!windowAssigner.isEventTime()) {\n                                                long currentProcessingTime =\n                                                        internalTimerService.currentProcessingTime();\n                                                if (mergeResult.maxTimestamp()\n                                                        <= currentProcessingTime) {\n                                                    throw new UnsupportedOperationException(\n                                                            \"The end timestamp of a \"\n                                                                    + \"processing-time window cannot become earlier than the current processing time \"\n                                                                    + \"by merging. Current processing time: \"\n                                                                    + currentProcessingTime\n                                                                    + \" window: \"\n                                                                    + mergeResult);\n                                                }\n                                            }\n\n                                            triggerContext.key = key;\n                                            triggerContext.window = mergeResult;\n\n                                            triggerContext.onMerge(mergedWindows);\n\n                                            for (W m : mergedWindows) {\n                                                triggerContext.window = m;\n                                                triggerContext.clear();\n                                                deleteCleanupTimer(m);\n                                            }\n\n                                            // merge the merged state windows into the newly resulting\n                                            // state window\n                                            windowMergingState.mergeNamespaces(\n                                                    stateWindowResult, mergedStateWindows);\n                                        }\n                                    });\n\n                    // drop if the window is already late\n                    if (isWindowLate(actualWindow)) {\n                        mergingWindows.retireWindow(actualWindow);\n                        continue;\n                    }\n                    isSkippedElement = false;\n\n                    W stateWindow = mergingWindows.getStateWindow(actualWindow);\n                    if (stateWindow == null) {\n                        throw new IllegalStateException(\n                                \"Window \" + window + \" is not in in-flight window set.\");\n                    }\n\n                    windowState.setCurrentNamespace(stateWindow);\n                    windowState.add(element.getValue());\n\n                    triggerContext.key = key;\n                    triggerContext.window = actualWindow;\n\n                    TriggerResult triggerResult = triggerContext.onElement(element);\n\n                    if (triggerResult.isFire()) {\n                        ACC contents = windowState.get();\n                        if (contents != null) {\n                            emitWindowContents(actualWindow, contents);\n                        }\n                    }\n\n                    if (triggerResult.isPurge()) {\n                        windowState.clear();\n                    }\n                    registerCleanupTimer(actualWindow);\n                }\n            }\n\n            // need to make sure to update the merging state in state\n            mergingWindows.persist();",
  "replace_all": false
}

  "newString": "        if (windowAssigner instanceof MergingWindowAssigner) {\n            MergingWindowSet<W> mergingWindows = getMergingWindowSet();\n\n            // For merging windows, check if the element is late before processing.\n            // Late elements should not be merged into any window, even if the resulting\n            // window would not be late yet.\n            boolean elementIsLate = isElementLate(element);\n\n            if (!elementIsLate) {\n                for (W window : elementWindows) {\n\n                    // adding the new window might result in a merge, in that case the actualWindow\n                    // is the merged window and we work with that. If we don't merge then\n                    // actualWindow == window\n                    W actualWindow =\n                            mergingWindows.addWindow(\n                                    window,\n                                    new MergingWindowSet.MergeFunction<W>() {\n                                        @Override\n                                        public void merge(\n                                                W mergeResult,\n                                                Collection<W> mergedWindows,\n                                                W stateWindowResult,\n                                                Collection<W> mergedStateWindows)\n                                                throws Exception {\n\n                                            if ((windowAssigner.isEventTime()\n                                                    && mergeResult.maxTimestamp() + allowedLateness\n                                                            <= internalTimerService\n                                                                    .currentWatermark())) {\n                                                throw new UnsupportedOperationException(\n                                                        \"The end timestamp of an \"\n                                                                + \"event-time window cannot become earlier than the current watermark \"\n                                                                + \"by merging. Current processing time: \"\n                                                                    + currentProcessingTime\n                                                                    + \" window: \"\n                                                                    + mergeResult);\n                                                }\n                                            }\n\n triggerContext.onMerge(mergedWindows);\n\n                                            for (W m : mergedWindows) {\n                                                triggerContext.window = m;\n windowMergingState.mergeNamespaces(\n                                                    stateWindowResult, mergedStateWindows);\n                                        }\n                                    });\n\n                    // drop if the window is already late\n                    if (isWindowLate(actualWindow)) {\n                        mergingWindows.retireWindow(actualWindow);\n     }\n\n                    windowState.setCurrentNamespace(stateWindow);\n                    windowState.add(element.getValue());\n\n                    triggerContext.key = key;\n                    triggerContext.window = actualWindow;\n\n                    TriggerResult triggerResult = triggerContext.onElement(element);\n\n                    if (triggerResult.isFire()) {\n                        ACC contents = windowState.get();\n                        if (contents != null) {\n                            emitWindowContents(actualWindow, contents);\n                        }\n                    }\n\n                    if (triggerResult.isPurge()) {\n                        windowState.clear();\n                    }\n                    registerCleanupTimer(actualWindow);\n
